name: home-assistant
description: Home Assistant IoT control — smart lights, switches, climate, and device state
author: heliox-core

tools.name: ha_light_toggle
tools.description: Toggle a smart light on or off by entity ID

tools.name: ha_light_brightness
tools.description: Set brightness of a smart light (0-255)

tools.name: ha_light_color
tools.description: Set the color of a smart light using RGB values

tools.name: ha_switch_toggle
tools.description: Toggle a smart switch/plug on or off

tools.name: ha_climate_set
tools.description: Set target temperature on a thermostat or climate device

tools.name: ha_get_state
tools.description: Get the current state of any Home Assistant entity

tools.name: ha_scene_activate
tools.description: Activate a pre-defined Home Assistant scene (e.g., 'Movie Night', 'Good Morning')

tools.name: ha_list_devices
tools.description: List all available devices and entities in the Home Assistant instance
